title: Cash Conversion Cycle Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Cash Conversion Cycle skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

average_inventory_balance.description: Average inventory balance for the period

cost_goods_sold.description: Cost of goods sold (COGS) for the period

average_accounts_receivable.description: Average accounts receivable balance for the period

average_accounts_payable.description: Average accounts payable balance for the period

total_revenue_period.description: Total revenue for the period (used to cross-check DSO against revenue rather than COGS)

peer_company_ccc.description: Peer company CCC data for benchmarking
